title: Gatherer.ofSequential() should be used to build sequential gathers
description: Ensures that Gatherer.ofSequential() is used when building sequential gathers in Java, promoting correct and efficient stream processing.
recommendation: Use Gatherer.ofSequential() when constructing sequential gathers to avoid unexpected behavior and improve code clarity.
impact: Improper use of gatherers can lead to incorrect stream processing and harder-to-maintain code.

noncompliant: Gatherer<String, ?, List<String>> gatherer = Gatherer.of(...); // Non-sequential gatherer used.
compliant: Gatherer<String, ?, List<String>> gatherer = Gatherer.ofSequential(...); // Correct usage for sequential gather.

checks.message: Use Gatherer.ofSequential() when constructing sequential gathers to avoid unexpected behavior and improve code clarity.
